name: profiling
description: Profile code with rocprof to identify kernel bottlenecks. After test, run profiling to get bottlenecks for further optimization.

profiling_workdir.description: Absolute path to directory, used to as working directory to running profiling command.

profiling_cmd.description: The command to execute the kernel during profiling, e.g. execution command using in performance test.

name: bash
description: runs the given command directly in bash
